title: Heltec V3: border router mode (WiFi backhaul)
description: Enable Heltec V3 as border router with WiFi backhaul. ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + WiFi. Implement: (1) WiFi station mode, (2) IPv6 prefix delegation from upstream, (3) RPL DODAG root, (4) NAT64/DNS64 or direct IPv6. Low power (~100mW), fits anywhere. Board files exist. $25.
